message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center

actor " " as Actor

boundary "ZMRegistracijskiObrazec" as ZMReg
boundary "ZMDomačaStran" as ZMDom
control "KrmilnikRegistracija" as Krm
entity "Uporabnik" as Upo

Actor -> ZMReg
activate ZMReg

ZMReg -> Krm
activate Krm

Krm -> Upo
activate Upo

Upo --> Krm
deactivate Upo

Krm -> ZMDom
activate ZMDom

deactivate Krm

deactivate ZMReg

deactivate ZMDom

@enduml
```
